title: Yoke
author: Jesselyn Radack
subline: Finding the sacred in the everyday.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A yoga figure in tree pose (vrksasana): stick-figure person balanced on one leg, arms raised overhead, fingers touching. The body is hairline, the fingers meet at a red dot (the 'bind point' / third eye). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none" stroke-width="3">
    <!-- A hairline horizon line (the ground) -->
    <line x1="-300" y1="320" x2="300" y2="320" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- The figure: head + body + raised arms + one leg standing + other leg folded -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <!-- Head -->
      <circle cx="0" cy="-340" r="36"/>
      <!-- Body/torso -->
      <line x1="0" y1="-304" x2="0" y2="40"/>
      <!-- Raised arms (overhead) -->
      <line x1="0" y1="-260" x2="-100" y2="-440"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-260" x2="100" y2="-440"/>
      <!-- A second pair of arms slightly lower -->
      <line x1="0" y1="-200" x2="-80" y2="-320"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-200" x2="80" y2="-320"/>
      <!-- The standing leg (left) -->
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-40" y2="320"/>
      <!-- The folded leg (bent at knee, foot on inner thigh) -->
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="80" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="80" y1="120" x2="40" y2="220"/>
      <line x1="40" y1="220" x2="0" y2="180"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 'bind point' — red dot where the fingertips meet overhead -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-460" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A faint red halo radiating from the bind point -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-460" r="36" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-460" r="60" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>
    <!-- A red dot at the third eye (between the brows) -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-360" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Yoga = yoke = union. A literal stick-figure person in tree pose (vrksasana), standing on one leg, the other foot folded at the inner thigh, arms raised overhead with fingertips meeting. The fingertip bind point is a RED 14px dot with a faint red halo radiating outward. A small red dot at the third eye. The figure is hairline; the sacred points are red. Title sits centered (the 'Yoke' word, 360px italic weight 300, the 'y' descends into a long tail). Brand 'अ + य' (the Devanagari letters) in the bottom-right; pill 'YOGA' at the top.
